title: 2D Mesh Viewer
description: Display a 2D mesh with cell-colored fields. Edit **field_name** and **time_step** in the code to switch between fields and snapshots.

title: Empty Figure
template:

ax.set_title('Empty View')

title: 3D Mesh Viewer
description: Interactive 3D mesh with cell coloring and camera navigation. Rotate, pan, zoom with mouse. Edit **field_name** and **colormap** in the code.
